title: JMAP_BASE_URL read per request from env
description: build_session reads std::env::var(JMAP_BASE_URL) on every GET /.well-known/jmap request. Env vars do not change after startup; this adds a syscall per request and buries the configuration policy inside a response builder. Suggested rewrite: read and validate JMAP_BASE_URL once at startup, store in DaemonState alongside LISTEN_ADDR, pass to build_session.
